name: New Data Source

---

**Data Source Name**
E.g., "MarineTraffic AIS API"

**API Documentation**
Link to API docs.

**Free Tier Available?**
- [ ] Yes (describe limits)
- [ ] No

**Data Type**
- [ ] Geopolitical events
- [ ] Natural disasters
- [ ] Market data
- [ ] Satellite imagery
- [ ] Other: ___

**Use Case**
How would this data enhance YC Hedge Fund?

**Implementation Notes**
Suggested endpoint location (e.g., `api/data/marine-traffic.ts`)
